urdu transliteration text: Aja Abbas tujy ro ro bulaye Zainab sa
english translation text: Zainab is crying and calling you O Abbas

urdu transliteration text: kaisy paband-e-rasan sham men jaye Zainab sa
english translation text: How will Zainab go to Damascus, tied in ropes?

urdu transliteration text: Kya krun ye to bta bhai nahi sir py rida
english translation text: What should I do, O brother, when I have no head covering?

urdu transliteration text: sir py baba b nhi kon suny meri sada
english translation text: I also do not have my father (Ali AS), who can hear my lamentation

urdu transliteration text: hukam zalim ka hy ye Drbar men aye Zainab sa
english translation text: The oppressor has ordered Zainab to enter the palace

urdu transliteration text: Mera baba hy Ali or mera nana Nabi saw
english translation text: My father is Ali AS and my grandfather is the Holy Prophet SAW

urdu transliteration text: drd o gham seh k bhi men deen bachane hun chali
english translation text: With pain and grief, I am still going to save the religion

urdu transliteration text: Bad shabbir k saye men nhi aai rubab
english translation text: After Shabbir AS, Rubab did not sit under a shade

urdu transliteration text: gham zdaa behan ko is bat ka dy koi jwab
english translation text: Can someone give an answer to this pain-stricken sister?

urdu transliteration text: dhoop sy us ko bta kesy uthaye Zainab sa
english translation text: How should Zainab remove her from the scorching sun?

urdu transliteration text: Sham manzil hy meri bhai hy be goro kafan
english translation text: My destination is Damascus and my brother lays without a shroud

urdu transliteration text: na hi matam hy kia na hi kia os ko dafan
english translation text: I haven’t been able to lament over him, nor have I been able to bury him

urdu transliteration text: bat ye tu hi bata kesy bhulaye Zainab sa
english translation text: Tell me how should Zainab forget these tragedies?

urdu transliteration text: kab hy asan ye khursheed bhla noha gri
english translation text: O Khursheed (poet), who says writing nawhas is easy?

urdu transliteration text: sukhanwar janty hen sary ye manzil hy kari
english translation text: All the Azadaar know that this is a challenging task

urdu transliteration text:
bat bnti hai jo ho jaye ata e Zainab sa
May Zainab accept this noble act
